# AI Crawler Directives for darshit.dev
# See: https://llmstxt.org/

# Default: Allow AI crawlers to index posts and about page for citation
User-agent: *
Allow: /posts/*
Allow: /about/

# Discourage crawling of thin content pages
Disallow: /tags/*
Disallow: /categories/*
Disallow: /search/

# Specific AI crawlers - explicitly allowed for citation opportunities
User-agent: GPTBot
Allow: /posts/*
Allow: /about/

User-agent: ChatGPT-User
Allow: /posts/*
Allow: /about/

User-agent: PerplexityBot
Allow: /posts/*
Allow: /about/

User-agent: ClaudeBot
Allow: /posts/*
Allow: /about/

User-agent: Google-Extended
Allow: /posts/*
Allow: /about/

# EU Directive 2019/790 content signals (as comments)
# search: yes
# ai-input: no
# ai-train: no

# Site metadata
Sitemap: https://darshit.dev/sitemap.xml
